name: code-annotator
description: Evaluations for code-annotator skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit-commands
evals.description: Skill should trigger on explicit /code-annotator invocations

evals.name: trigger-positive-natural
evals.description: Skill should trigger on natural language annotation requests

prompts.input: 请给这个项目的所有源文件添加中文注释
prompts.reason: Natural request to add Chinese comments to project files

prompts.input: 帮我给 src 目录下的代码加上中文注解
prompts.reason: Natural request to annotate source files with Chinese

prompts.input: annotate all source files with Chinese comments
prompts.reason: English request to annotate code with Chinese comments

evals.name: trigger-negative-unrelated
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for unrelated requests

prompts.input: Add inline comments to explain this function
prompts.reason: General comment request not specifically invoking code-annotator
Explanation request, not a code annotation task
